s: In 2018, Thomas Pannone suited up for TOR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.190, WHIP 1.210, SO 29, WAR 0.200.
In 2019, Thomas Pannone suited up for TOR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 6.160, WHIP 1.420, SO 69, WAR 0.000.
Changed teams after the previous season (TOR -> MIL).
In 2023, Thomas Pannone suited up for MIL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 6.750, WHIP 2.250, SO 4, WAR 0.100. Notable context: Joined MIL.
